allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('C:/Users/Albert Yang/Desktop/CaiShen/data/transactions.json'\); console.log\('Total transactions:', d.length\); if\(d.length>0\){ console.log\('Sources:', [...new Set\(d.map\(t=>t.source\)\)]\); console.log\('Latest 3:'\); d.sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.date.localeCompare\(a.date\)\).slice\(0,3\).forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.date, t.desc, t.amount, t.source\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('C:/Users/Albert Yang/Desktop/CaiShen/data/transactions.json'\); const today = d.filter\(t => t.date === '2026-05-20'\); today.forEach\(t => console.log\(JSON.stringify\({date:t.date,desc:t.desc,amount:t.amount,category:t.category,plaidCategory:t.plaidCategory,pending:t.pending}\)\)\)")
